copy.hero_title: One objective process, every matter you run.
copy.hero_sub: JusticeX runs each party's claims through an identical, citation-grounded comparison — so your table starts from a shared, neutral picture.
copy.how_lede: Inputs → identical process → cited legal references → symmetric outputs. A neutrality auditor halts the process on any asymmetry.
pain_points: Sessions stall because the parties arrive disagreeing on the facts, not just the terms.
Preparing an even-handed picture of both sides is slow and manual.
You need to stay visibly neutral while still moving the matter forward.

proof_points.title: Neutral by design
proof_points.body: Identical prompts, models, and depth per party. You stay the neutral — the software never takes a side.

proof_points.title: Faster to a shared picture
proof_points.body: Parties arrive aligned on facts, so sessions start on the differences that matter.

proof_points.title: Your brand, your table
proof_points.body: Reports are on-brand and audit-trailed; you decide what is shared and when.

copy.value_title: Built around the way you already work.
copy.cta_title: Bring an objective process to your table.
copy.cta_sub: Start with a walkthrough on a synthetic matter — see the full seven stages end to end.

example_matter.body: Two parties, one identical process. JusticeX summarizes each side to the same depth, then lays convergence and divergence side by side — objectively, with citations — for your session.

notebooklm_brief.subject: How an objective, citation-grounded comparison changes a mediator's first session (NY divorce & custody).
key_points: The identical seven-stage process, per party.
Where the neutrality auditor halts on asymmetry.
What the mediator controls: sharing, checkpoints, brand.
notebooklm_brief.disclosure_line: AI-assisted overviews · figures illustrative · not legal advice.

higgsfield_brief.art_direction: Documentary, monochrome-leaning, calm; hexagon motif; a neutral mediation table rendered abstractly — no faces, no gavel.
higgsfield_brief.negative_constraints: no fabricated human faces; no scales/gavel/courtroom; no stock handshakes; no off-palette

avatar.disclosure: AI-assisted presenter — shown at first exposure (EU AI Act Art. 50).

governance.notes: Pilot page — proves the recipe before fan-out. Summary scope (if in-product) limited to summary/status/gaps; options menu held for counsel.
